Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Red Faith]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith has pure white skin and hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith has lost his name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith uses blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith uses a Striker technique that takes on the aspect of a bird.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith uses a Ruler technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith uses an Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Red Faith's claws breached Eithan's armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Red Faith has claws.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Red Faith is the Sage of Red Faith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Red Faith is described as a cockroach walking like a man.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith is interested in Yerin Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith has Goldsigns that look like trails of blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith can follow through space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith intends to fuel Yerin Arelius's advancement as part of his experiments.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith is hunting for Yerin Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith is the mind in his relationship with the Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith uses blood and aura to calm himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Red Faith is sensed within the Redmoon Hall vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Red Faith is a group interested in Yerin's methods.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — A Herald was seen summoning lightning against Red Faith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Red Faith is bound to Yerin by a soul oath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — Red Faith provided Yerin with pointers on drawing in blood essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Red Faith is a Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Red Faith is tied to the Blood Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Red Faith failed his ascension to Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Red Faith is a researcher of Yerin's unique condition.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Red Faith is a Forger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Red Faith is a member of Redmoon Hall and identifies as not being like Redmoon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Red Faith uses nine daggers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Red Faith's daggers use blood and sword aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — Red Faith explains that the Phoenix uses a person's body as a medium to reach others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Red Faith is a character who finds Heralds difficult to deal with if they die without leaving a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Red Faith is a character who spoke to Redmoon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Red Faith is a Monarch with a long history.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Red Faith uses a launcher construct made from an ancient natural treasure cauldron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Red Faith's cauldron launcher releases green and black madra with aspects of venom and death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Bleeding Phoenix shreds Red Faith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Red Faith's combat involves blood and sword aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Red Faith provided protection to the group.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — Red Faith is dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Red Faith provides lectures to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Red Faith added designs to a concept based on the Phoenix madra's ability to create bloodspawn.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
